preset_notes.Balanced_150k_survival: 150k survival — CL 1 / MGC 7 / MNQ 2 / YM 1 (~0.64× full Balanced). Typical MC band: EOD $5k / DLL $3k.

preset_display_titles.Balanced_50k_high: Balanced $50k high — CL 0 / MGC 5 / MNQ 4 / YM 1
preset_display_titles.Balanced_50k_survival: Balanced $50k survival — CL 0 / MGC 3 / MNQ 1 / YM 1

projectx_settings_yaml:
# ProjectX live execution — credentials: use projectx/.env (see .env.example)
# or export PROJECTX_USERNAME, PROJECTX_API_KEY, PROJECTX_ACCOUNT_ID.
#
# API host must match your firm. TopstepX → api.topstepx.com (loginKey path is /api/Auth/loginKey).
# Other ProjectX firms may use https://api.thefuturesdesk.projectx.com (see Gateway connection URLs).

api:
  base_url: "https://api.topstepx.com"
  rtc_user_hub: "https://rtc.topstepx.com/hubs/user"

credentials:
  user_name: ""
  api_key: ""

trading:
  account_id: null
  live_contracts: true
  instruments:
    - symbol: MNQ
      search_text: "MNQ"
    - symbol: NQ
      search_text: "NQ"
    - symbol: CL
      search_text: "CL"
    - symbol: YM
      # Mini Dow ($5/pt). Gateway search "YM" can return MYM first; code picks mini (excludes MYM).
      search_text: "YM"
    - symbol: MGC
      search_text: "MGC"

execution:
  dry_run: true
  # --- Phoenix entry policy (live vs backtest parity) ---
  # With phoenix_entry_order: limit, ProjectX sends a resting **stop** at the engine trigger price.
  # If the last bar close is already through that level, the exchange treats the buy/sell stop as
  # invalid vs last — see entry_breakout_stop_valid in projectx/strategy/phoenix_auto.py. The engine
  # may still model a fill at the trigger (zero-slippage touch), so live can **skip** while backtest
  # shows a trade. Remedies: (1) accept the skip, (2) use CLI --phoenix-market-entry for immediate
  # market on signal, or (3) align research ExecutionOptions with the same story you trade live.
  #
  # Phoenix --phoenix-auto: parent order type. "limit" here means **stop@trigger** (breakout stop),
  # not a passive limit order. Use --phoenix-market-entry for immediate market.
  # phoenix_arm_orders: place buy/sell stop brackets at long/short levels when the trade window opens
  # (default true). Set false or use --phoenix-no-arm-orders to disable.
  phoenix_entry_order: limit
  phoenix_arm_orders: true
  # Phoenix scan: "touch"|"touch_legacy" = high≥long/low≤short (research default); "touch_strict" = wick-through.
  phoenix_entry_fill: touch
  # When true (default), Phoenix sends Telegram if PROJECTX_TELEGRAM_* env vars are set.
  # Set false to disable Telegram for Phoenix without using --phoenix-no-telegram.
  phoenix_telegram: true

risk:
  max_daily_loss_usd: 500
  max_drawdown_from_peak_usd: 1500
  max_position_contracts: 10
  max_trades_per_day: 10
  max_consecutive_losses: 3
  ny_session:
    enabled: true
    start: "09:30"
    end: "16:00"
  emergency_halt: false
  kill_switch_path: null

logging:
  level: INFO
  file: "projectx/logs/projectx.log"

auth:
  refresh_margin_seconds: 1800
  request_timeout_seconds: 30

# Phoenix quarter — user-specified eval numbers (verify vs live firm rules).
# 50k: $3,000 profit target, $2,000 trailing drawdown.
# 150k: $9,000 profit target, $4,500 trailing drawdown.
# Lucid rows include 40% consistency (best day / cumulative profit at pass).
#
# "Funded survival" rows use an enormous profit target so paths almost never "pass";
# bust_pct ≈ probability of hitting trailing (or DLL) within eval_window_days — a coarse risk proxy.

profiles:
  phoenix_topstep_50k_eval:
    label: "Phoenix Topstep-style 50K eval"
    account_size_label: "50K"
    profit_target_usd: 3000
    trailing_drawdown_usd: 2000
    daily_loss_limit_usd: null
    consistency_max_best_day_fraction: null
    min_trading_days: 1
    eval_window_days: 60
    max_contracts_note: "User Phoenix params"

  phoenix_topstep_50k_funded_survival:
    label: "Phoenix Topstep 50K funded — 120d survival proxy (no PT)"
    account_size_label: "50K"
    profit_target_usd: 1000000000
    trailing_drawdown_usd: 2000
    daily_loss_limit_usd: null
    consistency_max_best_day_fraction: null
    min_trading_days: 1
    eval_window_days: 120
    max_contracts_note: "bust% = trail/DLL hit in 120 resampled days"

  phoenix_lucid_50k_eval:
    label: "Phoenix Lucid-style 50K eval (40% consistency)"
    account_size_label: "50K"
    profit_target_usd: 3000
    trailing_drawdown_usd: 2000
    daily_loss_limit_usd: null
    consistency_max_best_day_fraction: 0.40
    min_trading_days: 1
    eval_window_days: 60
    max_contracts_note: "User Phoenix params"

  phoenix_lucid_50k_funded_survival:
    label: "Phoenix Lucid 50K funded — 120d survival proxy"
    account_size_label: "50K"
    profit_target_usd: 1000000000
    trailing_drawdown_usd: 2000
    daily_loss_limit_usd: null
    consistency_max_best_day_fraction: null
    min_trading_days: 1
    eval_window_days: 120
    max_contracts_note: "Consistency not applied for survival proxy"

  phoenix_topstep_150k_eval:
    label: "Phoenix Topstep-style 150K eval"
    account_size_label: "150K"
    profit_target_usd: 9000
    trailing_drawdown_usd: 4500
    daily_loss_limit_usd: null
    consistency_max_best_day_fraction: null
    min_trading_days: 1
    eval_window_days: 60
    max_contracts_note: "User Phoenix params"

  phoenix_topstep_150k_funded_survival:
    label: "Phoenix Topstep 150K funded — 120d survival proxy"
    account_size_label: "150K"
    profit_target_usd: 1000000000
    trailing_drawdown_usd: 4500
    daily_loss_limit_usd: null
    consistency_max_best_day_fraction: null
    min_trading_days: 1
    eval_window_days: 120
    max_contracts_note: "bust% = trail hit in 120 resampled days"

  phoenix_lucid_150k_eval:
    label: "Phoenix Lucid-style 150K eval (40% consistency)"
    account_size_label: "150K"
    profit_target_usd: 9000
    trailing_drawdown_usd: 4500
    daily_loss_limit_usd: null
    consistency_max_best_day_fraction: 0.40
    min_trading_days: 1
    eval_window_days: 60
    max_contracts_note: "User Phoenix params"

  phoenix_lucid_150k_funded_survival:
    label: "Phoenix Lucid 150K funded — 120d survival proxy"
    account_size_label: "150K"
    profit_target_usd: 1000000000
    trailing_drawdown_usd: 4500
    daily_loss_limit_usd: null
    consistency_max_best_day_fraction: null
    min_trading_days: 1
    eval_window_days: 120
    max_contracts_note: "Consistency not applied for survival proxy"

  # LucidFlex-style challenge (no 40% consistency); PT/trail match Topstep Phoenix rows.
  phoenix_lucidflex_50k_eval:
    label: "Phoenix LucidFlex-style 50K eval (no consistency)"
    account_size_label: "50K"
    profit_target_usd: 3000
    trailing_drawdown_usd: 2000
    daily_loss_limit_usd: null
    consistency_max_best_day_fraction: null
    min_trading_days: 1
    eval_window_days: 60
    max_contracts_note: "LucidFlex challenge model — verify vs live LucidFlex"

  phoenix_lucidflex_150k_eval:
    label: "Phoenix LucidFlex-style 150K eval (no consistency)"
    account_size_label: "150K"
    profit_target_usd: 9000
    trailing_drawdown_usd: 4500
    daily_loss_limit_usd: null
    consistency_max_best_day_fraction: null
    min_trading_days: 1
    eval_window_days: 60
    max_contracts_note: "LucidFlex challenge model — verify vs live LucidFlex"

embedded_yaml_files.scripts/configs/funded_payout_rules.exam:
# Funded-account payout simulation (simplified bucket model).
# Edit amounts to match current firm docs.

rulesets:
  lucid_50k_funded:
    label: "Lucid 50K PRO FUNDED"
    payout_increment_usd: 500
    min_trading_days_between_payouts: 3
    notes: "Payout profit target $500, Days to payout 3 (UI). No LucidScale/DLL/balance trail in this v1 model."

  tradeify_50k_funded_daily_path:
    label: "Tradeify-style 50K funded — Daily path (illustrative)"
    payout_increment_usd: 1000
    min_trading_days_between_payouts: 3
    notes: "Select 50k funded Daily path showed max payout $1,000; min days assumed 3 for comparability."

  flat_500_1d:
    label: "Simple $500 / 1 trading day (stress: frequent payouts)"
    payout_increment_usd: 500
    min_trading_days_between_payouts: 1
    notes: "Hypothetical if min days were 1."
